opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I've had this nagging headache on the side of my head all day, and my friend told me it could make me go blind overnight.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The headache won't shift and now I'm frightened about my sight.

symptom_narrative.onset: today, and a week of feeling mildly run-down
symptom_narrative.character: a nagging ache over the right temple
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: mild tiredness and aches this week; no jaw pain on chewing, no scalp tenderness, no visual changes or double vision

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: recent blood test showed a slightly raised inflammation marker

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: a friend frightened her about going blind

psychosocial_profile.hidden_agenda: wants reassurance she won't go blind overnight

objective_data_offered.value: my vision seems normal in both eyes when I cover each one; no dark patches or double vision
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: self-test; cannot examine temporal arteries or perform fundoscopy remotely
